cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Unity Engine. Runs fine. Has framerate issues, but not related to Proton/WINE. On 'fast' graphic settings, you'll get 60FPS. On highest graphic settings it can drop to 20-30 = not optimized use of Unity assets by devs.
title: Unconventional Warfare
